title: LocknLock Eco Food Containers with Lids - Rectangular 1Ltr (20.7 x 13.4 x 7cm), Airtight, Watertight, BPA Free & Dishwasher Safe
features: ECO FRIENDLY - Our 1ml food storage container is made of 100% food grade waste plastic. We are using our leftovers for your leftovers. Colours will vary due to the nature of the product.
AIR AND WATERTIGHT - This large rectangle food container uses the famous LocknLock system. This patented system guarantees a 100% water and airtight food storage container.
FREEZER AND DISHWASHER SAFE - Our eco friendly food container are freezer safe so you can plan and freeze your meals for later. They are also dishwasher safe to save you time cleaning up.
BPA FREE - The plastic used in our eco food containers with lid is 100% BPA Free. Our eco friendly products are not only good for the family but also great for the environment.
LIFETIME GUARANTEE - For your complete peace of mind and because we are so confident in the quality and the durability of these eco friendly food prep containers, we provide a lifetime guarantee.
description: From the manufacturer LocknLock Eco Containers Using 100% food grade plastic leftovers, our LocknLock Eco range is BPA Free. We are using our leftovers for your leftovers. Square, Round, Rectangle or in sets, these food containers will cover all your needs. Thanks to the famous LocknLock system they are extremely versatile and can be used in any situation. Due to the nature of this product, the colours will vary. Main Benefits Made from plastic leftovers Eco Container 100% Air and Watertight Freezer Safe Dishwasher Safe Microwave Safe BPA Free Random Colours Endless Possibilities Ideal for meal preparation Freezer, microwave and dishwasher safe. Our containers are perfect for any food preparation, morning oats, snacks, work lunch, only your imagination can stop you. Be Creative Store all your craft safely and avoid any unwanted spillage of paint, glitter or glue. The easy but safe opening means you are only seconds away from a masterpiece. No more messy playrooms Stepping on a little coloured brick will be a thing of the past with our storage containers. Stack them and your playrooms will look neat and tidy. Reuse = Reduce When buying any LocknLock ECO food container, you will contribute your share to helping the environment. Hygienically collected throughout production, we use our offcuts to make our Eco range.
